2603.23972.title: Grounding Arabic LLMs in the Doha Historical Dictionary: Retrieval-Augmented Understanding of Quran and Hadith
2603.23972.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in many language tasks, yet they continue to struggle with complex historical and religious Arabic texts such as the Quran and Hadith. To address this limitation, we develop a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework grounded in diachronic lexicographic knowledge. Unlike prior RAG systems that rely on general-purpose corpora, our approach retrieves evidence from the Doha Historical Dictionary of Arabic (DHDA), a large-scale resource documenting the historical development of Arabic vocabulary. The proposed pipeline combines hybrid retrieval with an intent-based routing mechanism to provide LLMs with precise, contextually relevant historical information. Our experiments show that this approach improves the accuracy of Arabic-native LLMs, including Fanar and ALLaM, to over 85\%, substantially reducing the performance gap with Gemini, a proprietary large-scale model. Gemini also serves as an LLM-as-a-judge system for automatic evaluation in our experiments. The automated judgments were verified through human evaluation, demonstrating high agreement (kappa = 0.87). An error analysis further highlights key linguistic challenges, including diacritics and compound expressions. These findings demonstrate the value of integrating diachronic lexicographic resources into retrieval-augmented generation frameworks to enhance Arabic language understanding, particularly for historical and religious texts. The code and resources are publicly available at: https://github.com/somayaeltanbouly/Doha-Dictionary-RAG.
2603.23972.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在許多語言任務中取得了顯著的進展，然而它們在處理複雜的歷史和宗教阿拉伯文本（如《古蘭經》和《哈迪斯》）時仍然面臨挑戰。為了解決這一限制，我們開發了一個基於歷時詞典知識的檢索增強生成（RAG）框架。與依賴通用語料庫的先前RAG系統不同，我們的方法從多哈歷史阿拉伯詞典（DHDA）中檢索證據，這是一個記錄阿拉伯詞彙歷史發展的大型資源。所提出的流程結合了混合檢索與基於意圖的路由機制，以便為LLMs提供精確且具有上下文相關性的歷史信息。我們的實驗顯示，這一方法提高了阿拉伯本土LLMs（包括Fanar和ALLaM）的準確性，達到超過85\%，顯著縮小了與Gemini（專有的大型模型）之間的性能差距。Gemini還作為LLM作為評判系統，用於我們實驗中的自動評估。自動判斷通過人工評估進行了驗證，顯示出高度一致性（kappa = 0.87）。錯誤分析進一步突顯了關鍵的語言挑戰，包括變音符號和複合表達。這些發現顯示了將歷時詞典資源整合進檢索增強生成框架中以增強阿拉伯語言理解的價值，特別是對於歷史和宗教文本。代碼和資源可在以下網址公開獲得：https://github.com/somayaeltanbouly/Doha-Dictionary-RAG。
2603.23972.author: Somaya Eltanbouly et.al.
